edge_hypothesis: The rsi_pullback template is fundamentally different from ema_rsi_atr despite sharing indicator components. rsi_pullback uses EMA_200 as a structural trend filter (price must be above/below the 200-period mean), EMA_50 slope direction as momentum confirmation, and RSI oversold/overbought zones for timing entries. This captures a specific market behavior: pullback-to-trend corrections where RSI reaches temporary extremes within an established long-term trend. The EMA_200 structural requirement means the template ONLY trades when a strong long-term trend exists — reducing whipsaw risk vs the EMA_9/21 short-term crossover in ema_rsi_atr. Combined with wide exits and ADX trending gates, this targets high-conviction reversion-to-trend entries. Regime assumption: TRENDING (price above EMA_200 + ADX>20). Invalidation: if PF < 0.95 with 50+ trades, the pullback-to-trend pattern does not reliably resolve profitably on ETH crypto markets.

variants.name: rsi_pullback_standard_trending
variants.description: Standard RSI pullback (RSI<40 for longs) with EMA_200 structural trend filter and ADX>20 regime gate. Wide 3:1 R:R exits apply the fee-killer thesis. The EMA_200 filter is the key differentiator from ema_rsi_atr: it requires a confirmed long-term trend, not just short-term EMA alignment.
entry_long: Close > EMA_200 confirms long-term structural uptrend.
EMA_50 slope is rising (current > previous bar) confirms intermediate momentum.
RSI_14 <= 40 indicates temporary pullback/oversold within the uptrend.
entry_short: Close < EMA_200 confirms long-term structural downtrend.
EMA_50 slope is falling (current < previous bar) confirms intermediate momentum.
RSI_14 >= 60 indicates temporary overbought within the downtrend.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: pullbacks may continue into trend reversals if EMA_200 breaks
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: rsi_pullback baseline — EMA_200 structural trend filter

variants.name: rsi_deep_pullback_wide_exit
variants.description: Deep RSI pullback variant (RSI<35 for longs) — requires a more extreme oversold condition before entering. Deeper pullbacks should produce better entries with more reversion potential. Ultra-wide 3.5:1 R:R to let winning pullback recoveries run. Only enters on significant dips within confirmed EMA_200 uptrends.
entry_long: Close > EMA_200 confirms long-term structural uptrend.
EMA_50 slope is rising (current > previous bar) confirms intermediate momentum.
RSI_14 <= 35 indicates deep pullback/oversold within the uptrend.
entry_short: Close < EMA_200 confirms long-term structural downtrend.
EMA_50 slope is falling (current < previous bar) confirms intermediate momentum.
RSI_14 >= 65 indicates deep overbought within the downtrend.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: RSI<35 may produce very few signals, risking insufficient trade count for validation
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: rsi_pullback baseline — EMA_200 structural trend filter
rsi_pullback confirmation — deep RSI<35 pullback zones
rsi_pullback volatility gate — wide 3.5x ATR TP

variants.name: rsi_shallow_pullback_fee_conservative
variants.description: Shallow RSI pullback (RSI<45 for longs) — more permissive entry threshold generates more trades. Combined with moderate 2.5:1 R:R and tight DD cap (10%). Tests whether the EMA_200 structural filter alone provides enough edge that RSI timing precision matters less than trade volume and consistency.
entry_long: Close > EMA_200 confirms long-term structural uptrend.
EMA_50 slope is rising (current > previous bar) confirms intermediate momentum.
RSI_14 <= 45 indicates mild pullback within the uptrend.
entry_short: Close < EMA_200 confirms long-term structural downtrend.
EMA_50 slope is falling (current < previous bar) confirms intermediate momentum.
RSI_14 >= 55 indicates mild overbought within the downtrend.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when RSI_14 > 65 (moderate overbought exit).
Exit short when RSI_14 < 35 (moderate oversold exit).
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (2.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: RSI<45 is generous — may admit entries that are not true pullbacks, just normal fluctuation
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: rsi_pullback baseline — EMA_200 structural trend filter
rsi_pullback confirmation — shallow RSI<45 pullback zones
rsi_pullback volatility gate — conservative DD compression
